## About This Project

A project built with **Expo, Expo Router, React, React Native, JavaScript, TypeScript, Node.js, GitHub Actions, pnpm**, located at `/Users/dogan/Desktop/copilot-mobile`.

## Tech Stack

- **Expo** v~54.0.0 (framework)
- **Expo Router** v~6.0.23 (framework)
- **React** v19.1.0 (framework)
- **React Native** v0.81.5 (framework)
- **JavaScript** (language)

- **Node.js** v>=20.0.0 (runtime)
- **GitHub Actions** (tool)

## Preferred Commands

```bash
# Install
pnpm install
# Typecheck
pnpm typecheck
# Test
pnpm test
# Build Bridge
pnpm build:bridge
# Build Shared
pnpm build:shared
# Dev Bridge
pnpm dev:bridge
# Dev Mobile
pnpm dev:mobile
# Test Bridge
pnpm test:bridge
```

- Follow the project's established patterns and conventions
